panels.description: The total count of messages received in last 24 hours.
panels.title: Messages received

panels.description: The total count of messages sent in last 24 hours.
panels.title: Messages sent

panels.description: Per-second average rate of ingress of data to topics. Dedicated cluster with 1 CKU has a max of 50MiBps.
panels.title: Production throughput

panels.description: Per-second average rate of egress data to topics. Dedicated cluster with 1 CKU has a max of 150MiBps.
panels.title: Consumption throughput

panels.description: The sum of partitions in a cluster. Dedicated cluster with 1 CKU have max partitions limit is 4500.
panels.title: Partition count

panels.description: Total Storage. Dedicated clusters have infinite storage but we flag at 5TiB
panels.title: Storage

panels.description: Per-second average rate of requests. Dedicated cluster maxes out at 15000 requests per second.
panels.title: Requests count

panels.description: Dedicated clusters have a limit of 5000 on the number of partitions that can be created and deleted in a 5 minute period. This single stat provides the absolute difference between the number of partitions at the beginning and end of the 5 minute period. This over simplifies the problem, so more conservative thresholds are put in place.
panels.title: Partition count change

panels.description: The total number of active connections to the cluster. Dedicated clusters with 1 CKU limit active connections to 3000.
panels.title: Client connections

panels.description: Load on the cluster. This is a measure of the utilization of the cluster
panels.title: Load on cluster

panels.description: Total data produced on the Kafka cluster in the selected time range
panels.title: Data produced in selected time range

panels.description: Total data consumed from the Kafka cluster in the selected time range
panels.title: Data consumed in selected time range

panels.description: Percentage utilzation of cluster
panels.title: Cluster Load %

panels.description: The total amount of bytes received per second over the network.
panels.title: Production Throughput(bytes/sec)

panels.description: The total amount of bytes sent per second over the network
panels.title: Consumption Throughput(bytes/sec)

panels.description: The count of records received over time. It is sum over time with inclusive range and must be read accordingly
panels.title: Production Throughput(records/time)

panels.description: The count of records sent over time. It is sum over time with inclusive range and must be read accordingly
panels.title: Consumption Throughput(records/time)

panels.description: The current count of bytes retained by the cluster, before replication, summed across all partitions
panels.title: Storage (pre-replication)

panels.description: The count of requests received over the network per second
panels.title: Request rate (per second)

panels.description: The current count of bytes retained by the cluster, before replication, summed across all partitions
panels.title: Storage (pre-replication)

panels.description: The count of bytes received per second from the network.
panels.title: Production Throughput(bytes/sec)

panels.description: The count of bytes sent per second over the network
panels.title: Consumption Throughput(bytes/sec)

panels.description: The count of records received over time. It is sum over time with inclusive range and must be read accordingly
panels.title: Production Throughput(records/time)

panels.description: The count of records sent over time. It is sum over time with inclusive range and must be read accordingly
panels.title: Consumption Throughput(records/time)

panels.description: The lag between a group member's committed offset and the partition's high watermark.
panels.title: Consumer lag

panels.description: The total number of schemas in schema registry. Schema registry usage is free up to 1000 schemas. After that it is charged
panels.title: Schema count
